channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Study reveals how Alzheimer's may spread in the brain
item.description: A common brain protein may help Alzheimer's spread by carrying toxic Tau proteins from damaged neurons to healthy ones.

item.title: Creatine may help treat depression, scientists say
item.description: Scientists are investigating whether creatine, known as a muscle-building supplement, could help treat depression by boosting brain energy.

item.title: NSF-DOE Vera C. Rubin Observatory begins capturing the greatest cosmic movie ever made
item.description: The NSF-DOE Rubin Observatory, funded by the U.S. National Science Foundation and the Department of Energy's Office of Science, has started operations.

item.title: A massive asteroid slammed into the North Sea and triggered a 330-foot tsunami
item.description: Scientists have confirmed the origin of the Silverpit Crater beneath the North Sea, linking it to an asteroid impact that caused a large tsunami.
